implemented_changes.change: Enabled IMU by default, increased IMU update cadence from 100 ms to 20 ms, and introduced a coherent encoder-to-yaw-rate scale while reducing encoder dominance in yaw fusion.
Fixed the observer so encoder-derived yaw is integrated in degree units rather than raw normalized wheel-difference units, and wrapped fused yaw consistently.
Marked successful non-blocking PC stream transmissions as active telemetry so continuous upstream streaming is reflected in runtime state.

root_cause_summary: Heading and turn geometry were degraded because yaw estimation integrated normalized wheel-speed difference directly as if it were an angle quantity.
Runtime IMU contribution was disabled by default and refreshed too slowly at 100 ms to support accurate heading assistance.
The host stream path was non-blocking but did not report itself as live telemetry activity.

verification.build_blocker: cmake executable not available in current environment
